title: Woodland Wins Houston Open
excerpt: Gary Woodland takes the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, with Nicolai Højgaard close behind
body:
Tour News: Woodland Claims Houston Open Title

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. The American golfer played a stunning game, with rounds of 64, 63, and 65.

Leaderboard Highlights

Nicolai Højgaard came in second with a score of -17, while Min Woo Lee and Michael Thorbjornsen tied for third at -12. The leaderboard was filled with talented players, but Woodland's consistent gameplay earned him the win.

Statistics from the Houston Open

Woodland's Winning Score
-18
Højgaard's Second Place Score
-17
Tied Third Place Score
-12

Other Tour News

Eugenio Chacarra has taken a four-stroke lead into Sunday at the DP World Tour event in India. Meanwhile, the LIV Golf tournament in Singapore saw the 4Aces GC team take the top spot with a score of -27.

The golf world is heating up, with talented players competing in various tournaments around the globe. Stay tuned for more updates from the world of golf.
